headline: Will WTW’s Qover Partnership and AI Profitability Findings Change Willis Towers Watson’s Narrative?
summary: Earlier this week, Willis Towers Watson announced a partnership with Qover to expand its GB Affinity embedded insurance technology ecosystem, while also releasing survey findings that link advanced analytics and AI use to stronger profitability and premium growth for North American property and casualty insurers. Together, these moves highlight how WTW is tying its own analytics and technology capabilities directly to real-world insurer performance and to embedded insurance demand across...
